content:
Since each week varies, we will cross-check each module layout before formatting.

For every week, we will:
1. Compare the Canvas Week Layout (as provided in screenshots and data dumps).
2. Ensure Every Slide, Assignment, and Quiz is Included.
3. List Any Differences & Confirm Before Proceeding.
4. Apply the Correct Numbering & Format Consistently.

📌 4. Quality Control Checklist (Before Submitting Weeks 2-6)

Each completed week will be checked for:

✅ Correct structure & format
✅ All required sections included (Based on Canvas layout.)
✅ Consistent Markdown usage & headings
✅ Rubrics properly formatted in tables
✅ Grammar, punctuation, and clarity checked
✅ Alignment with original Canvas content
context: From document: ENG 101 | Course Content Formatting & Protocols — chunk 7 (chunk 7/8)
